File is updated. Can you run the same `Get-FileHash` command again for the updated file? The content changed so the hash will be different:

```
Get-FileHash "C:\Temp\theia-test2\run\projects\0037-soccer-carpool-coordinator\docs\initiation\initiation-brief.md" -Algorithm SHA256 | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Hash
```

Also run it for project.md while you're at it — I'll need that one too:

```
Get-FileHash "C:\Temp\theia-test2\run\projects\0037-soccer-carpool-coordinator\project.md" -Algorithm SHA256 | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Hash
```
